# Generated by iptables-save v1.8.7 on Sat Mar 22 10:00:00 2026
*filter
:INPUT ACCEPT [50432:12345678]
:FORWARD DROP [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [48210:11234567]
[1500:120000] -A INPUT -i lo -j ACCEPT
[45000:9876543] -A INPUT -m conntrack --ctstate ESTABLISHED,RELATED -j ACCEPT
[320:25600] -A INPUT -p tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT
[8900:7120000] -A INPUT -p tcp -m multiport --dports 80,443 -j ACCEPT
[15:1200] -A INPUT -p icmp -j ACCEPT
[42:3360] -A INPUT -m limit --limit 5/min --limit-burst 10 -j LOG --log-prefix "BLOCKED: "
[200:16000] -A INPUT -j DROP
COMMIT
